name: sgs/content-collection
title: Content Collection
description: Query-driven grid of content items. Runs its own WP_Query with a named selection rule and renders each result through the dual-mode product card. Inspector controls only — no code required. (Spec 24 FR-24-4/5/6.)

grid.label: Grid
grid._layer_note: Root IS the grid — SGS_Container_Wrapper kind='layout' renders it (block_composition.container_kind=layout, wraps_block=sgs/container). layer_detect.py's MF-3 guard makes the root OUTER regardless of its own display, so OUTER is correct (mirrors card-grid).
grid._note: css:padding is an HONEST GAP — spacing.padding is explicitly false in supports and no flat padding attr exists; this block genuinely has no padding control. No `anim:*`/`position`/`motion` members — this block has no sgsAnimation/parallax/offset/transition attrs (unlike card-grid, which shares the grid layer shape but adds scroll-reveal). No `display`/`order`/`overflow` mapping exists (no flat attrs) — honest gaps.

empty.label: Empty state message
empty._note: emptyMessage is plain operator text (FR-24-6) — no colour/font/size control exists for it. Honest zero-cluster element, not an omission.

sgs._ownership_note: OWNERSHIP BOUNDARY (Spec 35): this block runs its own WP_Query and renders each result through render_block(['blockName'=>'sgs/product-card', ...]) — see render.php §6. Card internals (title/price/image/desc/cta/tag/pill) belong ENTIRELY to sgs/product-card's own manifest and are deliberately NOT declared here — declaring them would cross the delegated-rendering ownership boundary this block does not own. Only markup this block itself emits (the OUTER grid/list wrapper + the empty-state message) is declared above.

emptyMessage.default: No items to show yet. Check back soon.

showPickers.description: Forwarded to each rendered product-card. When false, suppresses in-card option-picker UI (axis pickers and pill pickers) — useful for browsing/shop grids where picker UI is unwanted. Default true.

ctaBehaviour.description: Forwarded to each rendered product-card. Controls the primary CTA: learn-more = link to PDP; add-to-basket = SGS cart proxy; buy-now = add then redirect to checkout.

showLadder.description: Forwarded to each rendered product-card. Browsing/shop grids default false (price + per-unit note only, no multi-row value ladder). PDP configurator cards use true.
